channel.title: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?
channel.description:
Hello Frontity community!
I am an absolute newbie to this, so I was poking around this and I managed to fetch my menu, but how do I fetch its items properties that come with WP right out the box, such as 'current-menu-ancestor', 'current-menu-parent', 'current-menu-item'? Is it something I have to do manually?
Thanks in advance.

item.title: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?
item.dc:creator: ganeshray
item.description:
Please explain it beriefly or give the access of code in github so we can solve it

Read full topic
item.source: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?

item.title: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?
item.dc:creator: robhhr
item.description:
hi community, would anyone help me out here please?

Read full topic
item.source: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?

item.title: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?
item.dc:creator: robhhr
item.description:
Hello Frontity community!

I am an absolute newbie to this, so I was poking around this and I managed to fetch my menu, but how do I fetch its items properties that come with WP right out the box, such as ‘current-menu-ancestor’, ‘current-menu-parent’, ‘current-menu-item’? Is it something I have to do manually?

Thanks in advance.

Read full topic
item.source: How to add 'active' state to current-menu-item on menu?
